title: Public API exports only V2 animation model
description:
Feature: Public API exports only V2 animation model
Scenario: Top-level imports expose V2 native API
Given the pypixoo package is imported
When a consumer imports from pypixoo
Then legacy animation symbols are absent and V2 symbols are available

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Top-level API now exports only V2-native animation/sequencing symbols; legacy animation exports removed.
